chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.214 of 2023 Ziauddin University & another Versus Basit Nazir Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.2053/23 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.2054/23 Dated: 14.11.2023 Mr. Wahaj Ali Khan for appellants. Mr. Shaharyar Ahmed holds brief for Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain for appellant No.2. -.-.- In view of instructions, as disclosed by Mr. Wahaj Ali Khan, learned counsel appearing for appellants, instant High Court Appeal, along with listed applications, is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge
